rulings.Case Title: PHILIP HOGUE et al VS. JUSTIN FORD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S Decision To Modify Its Tentative Ruling Based On The Erroneous Comments And Application Of Califoria Law At The Hearing By Counsel For Defts, Steve Winick
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 3, 2007, LINE 5. PLAINTIFFS PHILIP HOGUE, AMY MELNICSAK'S Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S Decision To Modify Its Tentative Ruling Based On The Erroneous Comments And Application Of Califoria Law At The Hearing By Counsel For Defendants, Steve Winick IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 1008. THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION PREVIOUSLY ISSUED PROVIDES PLAINTIFF WITH MORE THAN ADEQUATE PROTECTION PENDING TRIAL. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN SPAULDING et al VS. TIM HOMRICH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 3, 2007, LINE 7. HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF IS LIKELY TO PREVAIL. THE TESTIMONY OF BRANTA CLIENTS WILL MORE THAN LIKELY DETERMINE WHO WILL PREVAIL AND THAT EVIDENCE IS NOT BEFORE THE COURT TO ANY SIGNIFICANT DEGREE. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: MENGARELLI, ROBERT J. AND JOAN CARLSON MENGARELLI VS. DANIEL RAMIREZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Discretionary Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 3, 2007. LINE 8. DEFENDANT DANIEL RAMIREZ'S Motion For Discretionary Dismissal IS DENIED. THE COMMENCEMENT DATE IS DEEMED TO BE AUGUST 2005 WHEN THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED. THE PRIOR DELAY IS ATTRIBUTABLE TO A MISTAKE OF COUNSEL. THE LOST RECORDS ARE THE RESPONSIBILITY OF DEFENDANT. DISCOVERY HAS BEEN UNDERTAKEN. THE CASE IS SET FOR TRIAL IN AUGUST 2007 AND CCP 583.130 ESTABLISHES A POLICY FAVORING A TRIAL ON THE MERITS. = (302/PJM/PB)
